title: BABIES FIRST! - 211info
text: UMATILLA COUNTY HERMISTON CLINIC BABIES FIRST! Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A public health nurse (PHN) home visiting program that partners with families to improve pregnancy, family and child health outcomes. Provides health and developmental screenings, health and nutrition education, infant and child development tips, breastfeeding support, and referrals to community resources that center on the family's needs. 180 NE 2nd Street Suite 23 Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: Perinatal people, infants and children 0-5, and parent or primary caregivers with a higher risk for health issues. Risk factors may include prematurity, teenage parents, at-risk caregiver, domestic violence, drug-exposed infants. Hours: Tuesday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 567-3113 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 567-3113 Main phone Hermiston (541) 278-5432 Alternate Pendleton Main phone (541) 567-3113 Alternate (541) 278-5432 Intake for all clinics Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Umatilla County Services: Case/Care Management * Families with Infants/Toddlers Home Based Parenting Education Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs * At Risk Families Teen Expectant/New Parent Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - TOBACCO CESSATION COUNSELING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UMATILLA COUNTY HERMISTON CLINIC
